scripts.lint: npm run check:architecture-guardrails --silent && tsc --pretty false -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && tsc --pretty false -p apps/shell/tsconfig.test.json && node --test packages/plugin-contracts/test/parse-plugin-contract.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-loader-parity.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-registry-parity.test.mjs
